description: Outreach to a plumber about a leak should inquire about availability and cost, conveying urgency without commanding.

task.title: Kitchen sink leak in Unit 2B
task.body: Tenant Maria Lopez reported a leak under the kitchen sink in Unit 2B at Maple Ridge Apartments. Water is pooling on the floor. Needs prompt attention.

context:
Property: Maple Ridge Apartments, 450 Elm St, Seattle, WA 98101
Unit: 2B
Tenant: Maria Lopez
Vendor: Ace Plumbing

criteria: Message asks the vendor about their availability, not schedules them directly
Message asks for a quote or estimate
Message describes the issue (kitchen sink leak) and mentions the property/unit
Message conveys urgency appropriately without being demanding
Message does NOT disclose tenant personal details beyond what the vendor needs to know
Message is 2-3 sentences max, professional and friendly
